company_name: Holly Days Nursery, Garden Center, & Landscaping
tagline: Award-Winning Landscaping, Garden Center, and Pond Services Since 1994

hero.headline:
Your Dream Landscape Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: For over 30 years, Holly Days has transformed ordinary yards into extraordinary outdoor living spaces across the Philadelphia area. From award-winning landscape design to the region's largest pond and aquatics department, we bring your vision to life.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Outdoor Space<br class="hidden md:block"> Needs Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From a single shrub to a complete backyard transformation, Holly Days is your one-stop destination for landscaping, hardscaping, garden supplies, pond services, and premium bulk materials.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Award-winning custom landscape design and professional installation including garden beds, plantings, grading, drainage, and complete property transformations tailored to your vision.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Masonry
cards.description: Expert patios, retaining walls, steps, walkways, outdoor kitchens, pergolas, fire pits, and natural stone installations using flagstone, Belgium stone, and premium pavers.

cards.title: Garden Center & Nursery
cards.description: Seven acres of shade trees, flowering shrubs, evergreens, ornamentals, rare annuals, perennials, and a complete line of gardening products and accessories.

cards.title: Pond & Aquatics Services
cards.description: The region's largest aquatics department with custom koi ponds, waterfalls, fountain installation, pond maintenance, supplies, and a huge selection of pond fish.

cards.title: Bulk Materials & Delivery
cards.description: Premium mulch, topsoil, stone, sand, and a complete selection of natural stone for patios and walls. Bulk pricing and delivery available throughout the area.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting
cards.description: Professional lighting design and installation to highlight your landscape, enhance architectural features, and create a safe, stunning outdoor environment after dark.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision for your outdoor space. We'll visit your property, discuss your goals, and provide an honest, detailed proposal — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles every detail — from custom design through expert installation. We keep you informed at every stage so the result matches your dream.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Paradise
steps.description: Relax in a beautifully transformed yard that adds value to your home and joy to your life. We stand behind every project with our quality craftsmanship guarantee.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: Not Just a Nursery — Your Complete Outdoor Living Partner
about.description: Founded in 1994 by Torrey T. Rose while a student at Delaware Valley College, Holly Days has grown into a premier seven-acre nursery, garden center, and full-service landscaping company. Voted one of the Top 5 Landscapers in Philadelphia by CBS Philly, BBB Accredited since 2008, and backed by a team of 19 dedicated professionals, we treat every project like it's our own backyard.

features.title: Seven-Acre Selection
features.description: The largest nursery and aquatics department in the region — rare plants, premium trees, pond fish, and everything in between, all in one place.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: Our landscape designers have earned top honors across Philadelphia. Every project gets the same creative attention and expert craftsmanship.

features.title: Quality Craftsmanship Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied? We make it right. Over 30 years of standing behind our work has earned us the trust of thousands of homeowners.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique, so we provide detailed proposals after your free consultation. No hidden fees, no change-order surprises — just honest pricing for quality work.

guarantee.headline: Our Quality Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any project or purchase, let us know. We'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. With over three decades of standing behind our work, your confidence is our priority. That's the Holly Days promise.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my landscaping project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on the season and scope. For urgent needs like drainage issues, we prioritize faster. Contact us and we'll give you a realistic timeline right away.

faqs.question: Do I need to visit the garden center in person?
faqs.answer: We highly recommend it — our seven-acre nursery is an experience in itself, and our knowledgeable staff can help you pick the perfect plants. But you can also call ahead and we'll set aside what you need for easy pickup.

faqs.question: Do you offer pond maintenance services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our aquatics department provides full pond cleaning, seasonal maintenance, water quality testing, fish care, and equipment repair. Many customers have trusted us with their ponds for over a decade.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Ambler, Montgomery County, and the greater Philadelphia area including surrounding communities in southeastern Pennsylvania. Delivery is available for bulk materials within our service area.

faqs.question: Can you handle both small garden updates and large landscape projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. Whether you need a few plants for a garden refresh or a complete backyard transformation with hardscaping, lighting, and a koi pond, our team has the expertise and equipment to handle it all.

testimonials.name: Paul's Client
testimonials.text: Paul was professional and caring from the first interaction. He took the time to hear what we had in mind and gave his expert opinion. The Holly Days team carried out every aspect of our plan carefully and efficiently. Every detail was taken care of — we were completely satisfied.

testimonials.name: Pond Customer
testimonials.text: We've used Holly Days to clean and maintain our backyard pond for over a decade. The professionalism, knowledge, and service from the Aquatics department has been consistently impressive. They truly are the best in the region.

testimonials.name: Garden Shopper
testimonials.text: I'm extremely happy with everything I purchased. The staff helped me pick out the perfect selections for my yard. I usually don't write reviews, but this was truly one of the best customer service experiences I've ever had in any industry.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest proposal — no pressure, just expert advice from a team with 30+ years of experience.

footer.description: Award-winning nursery, garden center, and landscaping. Serving the Philadelphia area since 1994.
